finding_text: Personnel were observed touching equipment or other surfaces located outside of the ISO 5 area with gloved hands and then proceeding with aseptic processing without changing or sanitizing gloves.

finding_text: All reasonable precautions are not taken to ensure that production procedures do not contribute contamination from any source.

finding_text: There are no written procedures for production and process controls designed to assure that the drug products have the identity, strength, quality, and purity they purport or are represented to possess.

finding_text: Written production and process control procedures are not followed in the execution of production and process control functions and documented at the time of performance.

finding_text: Reports of analysis from component suppliers are accepted in lieu of testing each component for conformity with all appropriate written specifications, without performing at least one specific identity test on each component and establishing the reliability of the supplier's analyses through appropriate validation of the supplier's test results at appropriate intervals.

finding_text_ko: 비무균 원료로 제조된 경우에도 무균 인체 조제 의약품이 항상 무균시험을 받지 않았다.

finding_text: Equipment, materials, and/or supplies are not disinfected prior to entering the aseptic processing areas.
finding_text_ko: 장비, 자재 및/또는 소모품은 무균 공정(aseptic processing) 구역에 반입되기 전에 소독되지 않았다.

finding_text: The responsibilities and procedures applicable to the quality control unit are not fully followed.
finding_text_ko: 품질관리부서에 적용되는 책임과 절차가 완전히 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding the system for cleaning and disinfecting the equipment to produce aseptic conditions.
finding_text_ko: 무균 공정(aseptic processing) 구역은 무균 상태를 만들기 위한 장비 세척·소독 시스템에 결함이 있었다.

finding_text: The construction ofequipment and utensils fails to predude the adulteration offood with metal fragments.
finding_text_ko: 장비와 기구의 구조는 금속 조각으로 인한 식품 변질을 방지하지 못했다.
